1715260.name: Ghost Lantern: Kilminorth Farm
1715260.description:
Come investigate the old Kilminorth Manor Farm, in Cornwall. The place is said to be haunted!

A mysterious sealed box was discovered at Kilminorth Manor Farm during renovations. Inside, secreted away, were letters, old census information and strangest of all, a few glass photographic plates, from the era of early photography. The photographs, although ancient, clearly show the farm. A terrible crime happened at the farm nearly 200 years ago.

We invite you to solve an ancient ‘cold case’ crime! Study the old documents, call out into the darkness with your microphone, and see what the Ghost Lantern has to show you. A big tip, the room will be listening to you, so pick your questions carefully.

A short point and click adventure awaits at the old farm hidden deep in the Kilminorth Woods. A recent discovery has unearthed a mystery and several old glass photographic plates, ready to be viewed via the Ghost Lantern. Study the images, call out questions with your microphone and see if the room responds. Some say the vintage images seem to change, revealing more clues, as if the past was trying to reveal its secrets.

Explore a detailed recreation of the real farm, the most haunted room at the old house. We have conducted many ‘real world’ investigations of this location, offering this unique opportunity to explore the location yourself and delve deeper into the mystery. Follow the clues to a startling conclusion.

A point and click adventure involving deduction and paranormal investigation. Written and created by Jonathan Boakes, creator of The Lost Crown, Incubus and the Dark Fall video game series.

NOTE - An active system Microphone is required to play
